00 · About Me

WHO AM I

👤
My Story

I'm Nagulapalli Narasimha Naidu, a passionate Mechanical Design Engineer from Hyderabad, Telangana. I completed my B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering from Dr. Paulraj Engineering College (JNTUK) in 2025.

I hold a Professional Diploma in Mechanical CAD from CAD DESK, Hyderabad Ameerpet, with 200 hours of intensive training and an Excellent grade. My passion is creating precise, functional mechanical designs using industry-standard tools.

I specialize in 2D drafting, 3D modeling, and mechanical assembly design. I have hands-on project experience with SolidWorks assemblies and am actively seeking opportunities to grow in the field of mechanical design engineering.

Quick Learner Team Player Problem Solving Time Management Attention to Detail Open to Work

Complete wheel support assembly with individual part creation, constrained assembly, and detailed engineering drawings.

  • Individual part modeling with accurate dimensions
  • Assembly using Mate constraints (Coincident, Concentric)
  • Engineering drawing generation with all views
  • Bill of Materials (BOM) preparation

BENCH VICE ASSEMBLY

1/7
01Top
02Back
03Bottom
04Right
05Front
06Left
07Isometric

Bench vice mechanical assembly — a workholding device used to clamp workpieces during machining and fitting operations.

  • Fixed jaw, sliding jaw, and screw rod modeling
  • Assembly with motion constraints
  • Section view and exploded view generation
  • Material assignment and mass properties
Part DesignConstraintsExploded View
SolidWorks
SCREW JACK ASSEMBLY
◈ VIEWS
1/4
01Top
02Left
03Front
04Isometric

Screw jack lifting mechanism — a mechanical device used to lift heavy loads using screw thread action with precision.

  • Cup, screw, nut, and body component modeling
  • Thread feature design and lead screw modeling
  • Full assembly with proper mating conditions
  • 2D engineering drawings with dimensions
MechanismThreadsAssembly
